questions.question: Which shorthand correctly sets a 2px solid red border?
questions.explanation: The border shorthand accepts width, style, and color in any order, so all three declarations are valid.

questions.question: What does `border-radius: 50%` do to a square element?
choices: Turns the element into a circle
questions.explanation: Setting border-radius to 50% on a square element makes it a perfect circle by rounding all four corners equally.

questions.question: Which border-style value displays a line of dashes?
questions.explanation: The dashed value renders the border as a series of short dashes.

questions.question: What does `border-collapse: collapse` do on a table?
choices: Removes all borders from the table
Merges adjacent cell borders into a single border
Collapses the table to zero height
questions.explanation: border-collapse: collapse merges adjacent table cell borders into a single shared border instead of having separate borders with spacing.

questions.question: The ___ property sets the style of the border on the right side of an element only.
questions.explanation: border-right-style is the longhand property for setting just the style of the right border.

questions.question: To make a border visible, the ___ property must be set to a value other than none.
questions.explanation: A border will not appear unless border-style is set, since its default value is none.
